title: Maximum Area of a Piece of Cake After Horizontal and Vertical Cuts
hints: Notice that horizontal and vertical cuts affect dimensions independently. The largest piece is determined by the largest gap in each direction.
Focus on finding the maximum distance between adjacent cuts in one dimension. Include the cake borders (0 and max dimension) as implicit cut positions.
The answer is the product of the maximum horizontal gap and the maximum vertical gap. Compute these gaps separately before multiplying and applying modulo.
